blocks.body: Impersonal passive (Impersonal Passive) is a construction used to convey information, rumors, opinions without indicating a specific source. Typical constructions: It is said that... or Subject + is said + to...

{ "title": "8. Short summary", "items": [ "Construction 1: It + is/was + V3 + that + clause (It is said that...).", "Конструкція 2: Subject + is/was + V3 + to + infinitive (He is said to...).", "Reporting verbs: say, believe, think, know, report, expect, consider.", "Simple Infinitive (to be) is a simultaneous action with a reporting verb.", "Perfect Infinitive (to have done) — the action precedes the reporting verb.", "Continuous Infinitive (to be doing) is an action in progress.", "Used in official style, news, academic texts.", "Gives the text objectivity and formality." ] }
